theme_and_archetype.name: Archetype 5: Luxury (The 'Premium Academic')
theme_and_archetype.rationale: To avoid the childish or generic SaaS look, this educational platform takes a 'MasterClass' approach. It feels expensive, cinematic, and moody in dark mode, and crystal-clear in light mode. Color exists to guide action and gamification (XP/badges).

rules: Hierarchy Gap Rule: Ensure contrast in font sizes between headers and sub-headers.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generative padding: p-6 or p-8 inside cards, never cram content. Avoid jagged bottoms.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Widget ratios: 1-col for summaries, 2-col/3-col for main charts. Use h-full to stretch children.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align dense data, labels, and paragraphs. Avoid centering everything.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed width w-64, hidden on mobile (use hamburger for mobile). Dark mode sidebar: bg-card with 1px border-r border-border/50.

surface_strategies.dashboard_widgets: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), NO soft drop shadows. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) with border color darkening/lightening.
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism if floating (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 with 1px border-b). Or flat solid with hard bottom border.
surface_strategies.ai_chat: The 'Terminal' look or 'Tactile' variant. Clear distinct bubbles. User bubble: solid primary. AI bubble: muted background. Must have a glowing 'Tracing Beam' effect when AI is typing.
surface_strategies.forms: Pure HTML layouts + customized Shadcn inputs. Inputs must have clear focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50).

shadcn_overrides: Do NOT overuse standard Card component boundaries. Go rectangular, dense, and flat.
Tabs: Override fixed heights (h-9 to h-auto) to prevent content cutoff.
Charts: Use Shadcn Recharts. Ensure stroke and fill colors use HSL variables.
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-quiz-button', data-testid='chat-input', data-testid='sidebar-nav-link').
components.accessibility: Always set hover states explicitly (hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-white). Focus states must have higher contrast.

images.description: Student attentively reading. Use with max-h-[80vh] and a gradient overlay for text contrast.
Purple wave gradient. Use behind the gamification/XP dashboard header or AI Chat background with opacity-20.
Student sitting at table with books. Good for 'Study Planner' or 'Community' sections.

icons.rationale: High-end apps and dense dashboards look best with Phosphor's duotone or regular weights.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT ask for clarification. Follow these guidelines exactly.
Implement the Layout and Grid exactly as specified (The Control Room pattern).
Update tailwind.config.js to include Outfit and Manrope in the font-family.
Update index.css root and .dark variables based on the color_palette.
Use data-testid on all buttons, links, inputs, and major state-displaying components.
Implement Web Speech API for AI Chat Voice I/O.
Build Shadcn charts for Analytics (hours, quiz performance, weak areas).
Ensure dark/light mode toggle is prominent in the header or sidebar.
Gamification features (XP, Badges) must be visually prominent and use the specified glow dropshadows.
